D2 Vision L1 Identify Headliner

Everyday Color Confusion

toggle between trichromat and dichromat views to see which colour pairs collapse into the same percept

About one in twelve men and one in two hundred women see colour differently — most often confusing red with green, sometimes blue with yellow.

Click the four buttons to switch the page through normal, protanope, deuteranope, and tritanope vision. Notice which pairs of colours become indistinguishable.

Press C to cycle modes.
